_help: Capstone: model YOUR accelerator. Replace every __FILL__ from its datasheet, then run e.g.: ./tutorial.sh --gpu-file exercises/my_gpu_starter.json --host --n-gpus 8 --util 0.7 --grid-ci <your_region_gco2e_per_kwh>. memory_type is one of HBM3e|HBM3|HBM2e|HBM2|GDDR6|DDR4|LPDDR5. Add a cpu_configs block (cores, memory_size GB, storage_size GB) to model your own host; otherwise --host borrows a reference host. Reference: solutions/my_gpu.json and EServe/config/gpuconfigs.json.
